title: play replay load cannot restore the table with foreign key
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

```
CREATE TABLE authors (
    id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    email VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE books (
    id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
    title VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
    publication_date DATE NOT NULL,
    author_id INT,
    FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES authors(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

```
<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

succeed to run
### 3. What did you see instead (Required)

```
(1824, "Failed to open the referenced table 'authors'")
```

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE authors (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, email VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE);
CREATE TABLE books (id INT PRIMARY KEY, title VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL, publication_date DATE NOT NULL, author_id INT, FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES authors(id) ON DELETE CASCADE);
INSERT INTO authors (id, name, email) VALUES (1, 'John Doe', 'john@example.com');
INSERT INTO books (id, title, publication_date, author_id) VALUES (1, 'Sample Book', '2023-01-01', 1);
SELECT * FROM books WHERE author_id IS NULL;
key_bug_features: play replay load fails with foreign key constraints
